hackernews.issue: HN restricting Show HN for low-karma accounts (as of 2026-03-13)
hackernews.recommendation: Build karma by commenting on discussions for 1-2 weeks, then submit Show HN. Alternatively try submitting as regular story.

twitter.instructions: Twitter API requires developer account. Consider posting manually.
